title: The Brown Guild's Commission
intro: Master craft-wizards of the Brown delta send word: for a commission, they will come and reinforce Runehold's walls and works with earth-magic that outlasts the men who lay it. Practical magic, practically priced.

advisors.text: The Brown build things that do not fall down, Archon. Coin spent on their craft is coin you spend once. And they remember a good client.

choices.label: Commission the Brown to reinforce the hold

win.text: Brown crews work a season and leave Runehold's stones half again as strong, and the guild half again as warm toward you.
win.saga: You commissioned the Brown guild to reinforce Runehold; the hold stands stronger, and the delta counts you a client.

choices.label: Trade an apprentice's season of labour for the craft

win.text: You send an apprentice to learn at the delta for a season in lieu of coin. They come home a passable earth-crafter, and the Brown pleased.
win.saga: You traded an apprentice's season of delta labour for the Brown's craft, warming the guild and learning its earth-work.

win.text: You send the guild's word back unanswered. Runehold's walls will stand as they are — and the Brown will remember being turned down.
win.saga: You declined the Brown guild's commission, cooling the delta's regard for Runehold.
